_comment: SWEEP variant 'lreg10' to fix the all-opto block-assignment collapse. Overrides vs keypoints_dataset4.json: {'lambda_reg': 0.1, 'classifier_gumbel_temperature': 1.0}. lambda_reg pushes latents into psi0 (flow-prior path adds lambda_reg*(1-P(psi0)) to NLL); lower gumbel temp sharpens the partition. beta_classifier kept at 2.0 on purpose (raising it reinforces opto assignment).
